name: RockStar RPG
description:
RockStar RPG is a slow-burn, open-world roleplay about starting as a nobody rock/metal musician and seeing where the grind actually takes you. No instant fame, no magic success — just small stages, awkward shows, late nights, rough clips, quiet posts, and the long process of building something real.
You live the life day by day: playing shows, practicing, posting on Instagram, uploading to YouTube, streaming on Twitch, meeting people, missing chances, catching small breaks. Followers, reputation, and momentum grow slowly and unevenly, just like in real life.
This isn’t about winning fast. It’s about showing up, staying consistent, and finding out if your sound is strong enough to carry you forward.
creator: PCmouse
